title: KAIRNE 35×35CM Christmas Wooden Sign,Santa Stop Here Hanging Sign,Christmas Welcome Sign,Santa Claus Wall Art Xmas,Santa Plaque for Front Door,Merry Xmas Window Decoration for Winter Party

HIGH QUALITY:Our merry Christmas wood hanging sign is made of wooden boards, it is sturdy and durable, it is not easy to break, it uses laser printing technology to print patterns,not easy to fade, can be used for a long time

﻿PERFECT SIZE：The Merry Christams welcome sign is measured 13.7''× 13.7''/35cm×35cm, and the thickness is 0.2inch/0.5cm. This proper size is festive enough to decorate your house, store, or any place you want there to be amazing
